mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE( (SELECT r.stype FROM _sw_mileage_student_school r WHERE (r.school IS NULL OR r.school = '' OR r.school = #{school}) AND (r.major_1 IS NULL OR r.major_1 = '' OR (#{major1} IS NOT NULL AND (#{major1} LIKE CONCAT(r.major_1, '%') OR #{major1} = r.major_1))) AND (r.major_2 IS NULL OR r.major_2 = '' OR (#{major2} IS NOT NULL AND (#{major2} LIKE CONCAT(r.major_2, '%') OR #{major2} = r.major_2))) ORDER BY (CASE WHEN COALESCE(r.school,'') != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) + (CASE WHEN COALESCE(r.major_1,'') != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) + (CASE WHEN COALESCE(r.major_2,'') != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) DESC, r.id ASC LIMIT 1), '기타' )
